griego-family-larger-mT.last_note: Certificate-rational hole closed: held raised 1.1741 to 1.176. Independently reproduced s,d,M at (110,210) via from-scratch bitmask DP (validated vs brute on 10 cases); d^10000>s^10000*q^1760 holds, ^1761 fails (1.176 tight at den 10000). Beats record 1.1740744.
griego-family-larger-mT.summary: Push Griego's fixed alphabet/base-21 family to (m,T)>(80,150) via exact column-DP; cheapest probe, may saturate at the record.

griego-ntt-push.last_note: R16's one open hole (s=|U+U| at m=180) CLOSED: reviewer independently reproduced s digit-for-digit (175d, head 95094840942995635699, tail 45023204043252245774) in 46MB with a memory-bounded Σy-bitmask DP (states saturate ~70.9k; R16 OOM was a concurrency artifact, not algorithmic), gate-validated on 27 brute cases. d/M byte-exact, cert PASS ^11781 (+54.61) / FAIL ^11782 (−183.39). Held RAISED 1.1779→1.1781, beats record 1.1740744. APPROVE/verified.
griego-ntt-push.summary: NTT/exact-FFT fast convolution + repeated-squaring sum-set DP to break the m=110 compute wall and climb toward Lambda~1.185; mandatory validation vs the R3 clamped-DP oracle before any large-m count is trusted.

largedev-rate-optimization.summary: Large-deviation rate guide to predict the optimal (A,r), certified by L1's finite integer check; highest ceiling, slowest first-green.

lean-c3a-def.last_note: realizes_one hole CLOSED sorry-free + axiom-clean (witness A n=B n=Icc 0 n, K=3) via icc_setSum_card/icc_setDiff_card (interval sumset/diffset identities, decide-verified); realizableSet_nonempty now sorry-free. bddAbove reshaped sorry-free around new isolated hole ghr_upper (4/3 cap, honest relocation). 4 holes remain: ghr_upper, B2/B3/B4 (all hard real analysis). Build EXIT 0, top-level c3a_lower_bound_def untouched; structural, no held raise (bridge literal 1.1771<held 1.1781).
lean-c3a-def.summary: Scoped definition-only Lean sketch: concrete C3aRealDef := sSup {c | Realizes c} replacing the opaque C_3a, isolating the sole uncached bridge blocker (the sup-realization read-off) for a cheap faithfulness in/out ruling. CHANGES REQUESTED R12: predicate drops the |A+B|<<|A| doubling clause and collapses A=B, so as written it risks defining an inflated (non-faithful) constant; the approach is right and the fix is nameable.

lean-native-decide-smallmt.last_note: native_decide integer core bumped from θ>1.175 to den=10000 tight θ>1.1771 at (140,265): D^10000>S^10000*Q^1771 + tightness control ¬(^1772), lake build EXIT 0, #print axioms clean (no sorryAx), literals match committed row. ghr:θ≤C3aReal bridge still an explicit assumed hypothesis (C3aReal opaque) → minimally-verified (*), does NOT raise held. Open hole: formalize GHR bridge.
lean-native-decide-smallmt.summary: Machine-checked (lake build) C_3a>1.175 via native_decide on D^40>S^40·Q^7 at Griego (100,190); load-bearing int cert already green/hole-free, only theta-translation + GHR read-off remain as sorry holes.

lean-tensor-multiplicativity.last_note: All 7 holes CLOSED, sorry-free, axiom-clean ([propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound], no sorryAx); lake build C3a EXIT 0. Formalizes the FINITE half of the GHR bridge (carry-free tensor-power multiplicativity |U^⊗(k+1)±U^⊗(k+1)|=|U±U|^(k+1)); 2 lemmas promoted to lemmas/. Does NOT raise held — sup-realization k→∞ limit + C_3a definition remain the open hole.
lean-tensor-multiplicativity.summary: Formalize carry-free tensor-power multiplicativity |U^⊗k ± U^⊗k| = |U±U|^(k+1) as Lean Finset counting lemmas; chips the finite/discrete half off the GHR bridge hole (Lean-fit, 7 sorrys, builds green).

noncontig-alphabet-sweep.summary: Sweep non-contiguous digit alphabets A (generalize Griego's {0,2..10}) feeding the GHR lemma; finite integer-inequality certificate, Lean-fit.
